An ETF With a National Security Screen That's Outpacing Broad EM

holdings.infoBox: NSI is an equity ETF with a total of 106 individual holdings.

overview.description: The National Security Emerging Markets Index ETF (NSI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks an emerging markets index that excludes companies perceived to pose a threat to the US national security. Selected securities are weighted by market-cap. NSI was launched on Dec 6, 2023 and is issued by Tuttle Capital.
